data.name: Fallen / Brand New World
data.detailed_description:
A "cohabitation life simulation" where you live under the same roof as the heroine and interact freely.

Lily serves as your maid and spends day and night with you.

Manage a tavern together, deepen your bond, and enjoy life in the city.

■ Story

The long war has ended, leaving knights and mercenaries without work.

Living quietly in the tavern left by your grandfather, you one day take in a lone girl.

Your carefree retirement comes to an end,

and a busy life of running the tavern alongside Lily begins...

■ Life with Lily

Inside the tavern or bedroom, you can interact with the heroine through conversation and physical contact.

You can choose various actions, such as stroking her through touch commands or inviting her to sexual activities.

■ Tavern Management

Gather ingredients from city shops or the outskirts and cook original dishes.

Setting up prepared menus and furnishings will affect the tavern's management and the player stats.

■ Intimacy Mode

Through interaction commands and touch actions, you can freely engage in sexual activities.

The more you act, the more Lily will open up to new experiences.

■ Lily’s Dress-Up

You can change Lily’s hairstyle and outfit separately between workwear and nightwear.

Various parts such as bangs, back hair, hair accessories, outfit, and underwear can be collected.

data.short_description: A "cohabitation life simulation" where you live under the same roof as the heroine and interact freely. Lily serves as your maid and spends day and night with you. Manage a tavern together, deepen your bond, and enjoy life in the city.
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 日文*, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1 later
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體

data.supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese, Japanese*, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 8.1 later
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
